subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book in the Kingdom of the Bayán maketh mention of the friends of God, that through remembrance and utterance they may be drawn nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب در ملکوت بیان دوستان الهی را ذکر مینماید لیجذبهم الذکر و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
